_meta.note: Imported Pahadi catalog. Audio/artwork on Cloudflare R2 (no bundled MP3s). Visible in-app (LICENSED) and flagged "needs-metadata-review".

artists.name: Unknown Artist
artists.bio: Placeholder profile for imported recordings whose artist is not yet identified. Reassign tracks to real artists in the dashboard.
